messages.content: Worker, I need you to run a data-gathering sweep before the Monday standup wraps up. Specifically: pull the latest MemorySync benchmark numbers from the internal dashboard, check our GitHub Actions pipeline status across the main repos, grab the current OpenClaw token usage + cost metrics for today (2026/03/09), and flag any anomalies. We're in the middle of the cost optimization sprint so I want hard numbers. Go.

Understood, Alex. Executing a four-track data-gathering sweep now. Here's the plan before I fire off the tools:

**Execution Plan — 2026/03/09 19:19 SAST**

| Track | Target | Tool |
|-------|--------|------|
| 1 | MemorySync benchmark results (internal) | `fetch_internal_dashboard` |
| 2 | GitHub Actions pipeline status (openclaw-core, engage-x, contentway, worker-runtime) | `gh_actions_status` |
| 3 | Token usage + cost metrics for today | `cost_metrics_query` |
| 4 | Anomaly detection pass | `anomaly_scan` |

Running tracks 1–3 in parallel now. Anomaly scan will run after data is in hand.

**[TOOL CALLS — Parallel Execution]**

```
> fetch_internal_dashboard(source="memorysync_benchmarks", date="2026-03-09", version="latest")
> gh_actions_status(repos=["openclaw-core", "engage-x", "contentway", "worker-runtime"], branch="main", limit=10)
> cost_metrics_query(date="2026-03-09", granularity="hourly", breakdown_by=["agent", "model"])
```

---

**[TOOL OUTPUT — fetch_internal_dashboard]**
```json
{
  "source": "memorysync_benchmarks",
  "published": "2026-03-09T07:14:00Z",
  "version": "v3.1.2",
  "results": {
    "recall_accuracy": 0.914,
    "context_retention_5k_tokens": 0.887,
    "context_retention_32k_tokens": 0.761,
    "avg_retrieval_latency_ms": 43,
    "p99_retrieval_latency_ms": 112,
    "benchmark_suite": "OpenClaw Memory Benchmark v3",
    "delta_vs_v3_1_1": {
      "recall_accuracy": "+0.023",
      "avg_retrieval_latency_ms": "-7ms"
    }
  }
}
```

**[TOOL OUTPUT — gh_actions_status]**
```json
{
  "openclaw-core": {"last_run": "2026-03-09T16:42:00Z", "status": "success", "duration_s": 184},
  "engage-x":      {"last_run": "2026-03-09T15:11:00Z", "status": "success", "duration_s": 97},
  "contentway":    {"last_run": "2026-03-09T18:03:00Z", "status": "failed",  "duration_s": 61, "step_failed": "integration-test", "error": "AssertionError: expected 200, got 503 on /api/v2/draft"},
  "worker-runtime":{"last_run": "2026-03-09T17:58:00Z", "status": "success", "duration_s": 143}
}
```

**[TOOL OUTPUT — cost_metrics_query]**
```json
{
  "date": "2026-03-09",
  "total_cost_usd": 3.84,
  "budget_daily_usd": 5.00,
  "utilization_pct": 76.8,
  "breakdown": {
    "echo":        {"tokens_in": 412000, "tokens_out": 89000, "cost_usd": 1.92},
    "engage-x":    {"tokens_in": 198000, "tokens_out": 41000, "cost_usd": 0.87},
    "contentway":  {"tokens_in": 173000, "tokens_out": 38000, "cost_usd": 0.71},
    "worker":      {"tokens_in": 54000,  "tokens_out": 12000, "cost_usd": 0.24},
    "trustalign":  {"tokens_in": 22000,  "tokens_out": 4000,  "cost_usd": 0.10}
  },
  "spike_events": [
    {"hour": "09:00-10:00 SAST", "agent": "engage-x", "cost_usd": 0.31, "note": "acquisition_news monitoring burst"},
    {"hour": "10:30-11:30 SAST", "agent": "contentway", "cost_usd": 0.28, "note": "technical_blog_posts ideation session"}
  ]
}
```

**[TOOL CALL — Anomaly Scan]**

```
> anomaly_scan(inputs=["memorysync_benchmarks", "gh_actions", "cost_metrics"], thresholds={"latency_p99_ms": 150, "cost_daily_pct": 90, "pipeline_fail_rate": 0})
```

**[TOOL OUTPUT — anomaly_scan]**
```json
{
  "anomalies_detected": 2,
  "items": [
    {
      "id": "ANM-001",
      "severity": "HIGH",
      "source": "gh_actions",
      "repo": "contentway",
      "description": "Pipeline failure on integration-test step. /api/v2/draft returning 503. Last successful run was 2026-03-08T22:17Z.",
      "recommended_action": "Inspect draft endpoint — likely related to the contentway session at 10:39 SAST today (contentway_session_20260309_1039). Possible schema mismatch from blog post template changes."
    },
    {
      "id": "ANM-002",
      "severity": "LOW",
      "source": "cost_metrics",
      "agent": "engage-x",
      "description": "Burst cost of $0.31 in 09:00–10:00 SAST window (acquisition_news monitoring, engage_x_session_20260309_0923). 3.1x above hourly average of $0.10.",
      "recommended_action": "Review engage-x monitoring cadence for acquisition_news topic. Consider rate-limiting refresh interval during non-peak hours."
    }
  ],
  "clear_items": ["memorysync_latency", "daily_budget_ceiling", "openclaw-core_pipeline", "worker-runtime_pipeline"]
}
```

**[VERIFICATION PASS]**

Cross-checking outputs for consistency before reporting:

- ✅ MemorySync v3.1.2 benchmarks published `2026-03-09T07:14Z` — predates our session, data is fresh for today's standup.
- ✅ Cost total ($3.84) reconciles: $1.92 + $0.87 + $0.71 + $0.24 + $0.10 = **$3.84** ✓
- ✅ engage-x spike at 09:00–10:00 SAST aligns with `acquisition_news` session logged at `engage_x_session_20260309_0923` in entity context.
- ✅ contentway cost spike at 10:30–11:30 SAST aligns with `technical_blog_posts` session `contentway_session_20260309_1039`.
- ✅ worker-runtime and openclaw-core pipelines both green — no worker model upgrade breakage (relevant given agent config changes under consideration this week).
- ⚠️ contentway pipeline failure (`ANM-001`) is unresolved — flagged HIGH, needs human triage.
- ℹ️ MemorySync recall accuracy at 91.4% (+2.3pp vs v3.1.1) and p99 latency at 112ms (well under 150ms threshold) — no anomaly.

All data internally consistent. Proceeding to report.

---

## 📊 Worker Data-Gathering Report
**Session:** `worker_tool_execution_20260309_1919` | **Generated:** 2026/03/09 19:22 SAST

---

### 1. MemorySync Benchmarks (v3.1.2 — OpenClaw Memory Benchmark v3)

| Metric | Score | Δ vs v3.1.1 |
|---|---|---|
| Recall Accuracy | **91.4%** | +2.3pp ✅ |
| Context Retention @ 5k tokens | 88.7% | — |
| Context Retention @ 32k tokens | 76.1% | — |
| Avg Retrieval Latency | **43ms** | -7ms ✅ |
| p99 Retrieval Latency | 112ms | (threshold: 150ms) ✅ |

**Summary:** MemorySync is trending positive. The +2.3pp recall gain and latency reduction are meaningful for rapid-iteration week — no blockers here.

---

### 2. GitHub Actions Pipeline Status

| Repo | Status | Last Run (SAST) | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| openclaw-core | ✅ Success | 18:42 | 184s |
| engage-x | ✅ Success | 17:11 | 97s |
| contentway | ❌ **FAILED** | 20:03 | `integration-test` → 503 on `/api/v2/draft` |
| worker-runtime | ✅ Success | 19:58 | 143s — model upgrade safe |

> **⚠️ ANM-001 [HIGH]:** contentway pipeline down. `/api/v2/draft` returning 503 since ~18:03 SAST. Likely linked to template changes from `contentway_session_20260309_1039` (technical blog posts ideation). **Needs immediate triage before tomorrow's content deploys.**

---

### 3. Token Usage & Cost — 2026/03/09

| Agent | Tokens In | Tokens Out | Cost (USD) |
|---|---|---|---|
| Echo | 412,000 | 89,000 | $1.92 |
| engage-x | 198,000 | 41,000 | $0.87 |
| contentway | 173,000 | 38,000 | $0.71 |
| worker | 54,000 | 12,000 | $0.24 |
| trustalign | 22,000 | 4,000 | $0.10 |
| **TOTAL** | **859,000** | **184,000** | **$3.84 / $5.00 (76.8%)** |

**Cost optimization sprint status:** On track. 76.8% daily utilization with ~3 hours left — projected end-of-day ~$4.40, within budget.

**Notable spikes:**
- engage-x burst ($0.31) at 09:00–10:00 SAST → `acquisition_news` monitoring (`engage_x_session_20260309_0923`). Recommend reviewing refresh cadence.
- contentway burst ($0.28) at 10:30–11:30 SAST → technical blog ideation (`contentway_session_20260309_1039`). Expected, not a concern.

---

### 4. Anomaly Summary

| ID | Severity | Area | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| ANM-001 | 🔴 HIGH | contentway pipeline | **Open — needs triage** |
| ANM-002 | 🟡 LOW | engage-x cost spike | Monitor — recommend config review |

---

### Recommended Actions
1. **[Urgent]** Investigate contentway `/api/v2/draft` 503 — check if schema changes from blog post session broke the integration test endpoint.
2. **[This week]** Tune engage-x monitoring cadence for `acquisition_news` to reduce off-peak bursts (supports cost optimization sprint).
3. **[FYI]** worker-runtime pipeline green post-recent runs — safe to continue evaluating worker model upgrade without pipeline risk.
4. **[Positive signal]** MemorySync v3.1.2 benchmarks strong — worth referencing in next external update if/when TrustAlign scoring model review touches memory reliability.

---
*Report generated by Worker agent | Beacon Studio — OpenClaw v3 | Data as of 19:22 SAST*

Good sweep. On ANM-001 — can you dig deeper into the contentway pipeline failure? I want the actual error trace from the failing integration test, and cross-reference with what changed in `contentway_session_20260309_1039`. If it's a schema mismatch from the blog post templates, I need to know exactly which field broke.

On it. Pulling the full error trace and session diff now.

```
> gh_actions_logs(repo="contentway", run_id="latest", step="integration-test", tail=80)
> session_context_fetch(session_id="contentway_session_20260309_1039", fields=["schema_changes", "template_mutations", "api_calls"])
```

---

**[TOOL OUTPUT — gh_actions_logs]**
```
RUN: contentway / integration-test / 2026-03-09T18:03:11Z

  PASS  tests/unit/draft-builder.test.ts (14 tests)
  PASS  tests/unit/content-parser.test.ts (9 tests)
  FAIL  tests/integration/api-draft.test.ts

  ● POST /api/v2/draft › should create a technical blog draft with full metadata

    AssertionError: expected 200, got 503

      at Object.<anonymous> (tests/integration/api-draft.test.ts:87:5)

    Request payload sent:
    {
      "type": "technical_blog",
      "template_version": "v2.4",
      "fields": {
        "title": "string",
        "summary": "string",
        "body_markdown": "string",
        "tags": ["string"],
        "reading_time_min": "integer",
        "seo_slug": "string",
        "code_samples": [
          {"lang": "string", "snippet": "string", "caption": "string"}
        ],
        "technical_depth": "enum[beginner|intermediate|advanced]",
        "author_agent": "string"
      }
    }

    Server response body:
    {
      "error": "ValidationError",
      "message": "Unknown field: 'technical_depth'. Schema v2.3 does not recognise this field. Current accepted fields: title, summary, body_markdown, tags, reading_time_min, seo_slug, code_samples, author_agent.",
      "schema_version": "2.3",
      "received_template_version": "v2.4"
    }

Test Suites: 1 failed, 2 passed
Tests:       1 failed, 23 passed
Time:        61.4s
```

---

**[TOOL OUTPUT — session_context_fetch: contentway_session_20260309_1039]**
```json
{
  "session_id": "contentway_session_20260309_1039",
  "topic": "technical_blog_posts",
  "duration_min": 47,
  "schema_changes": [
    {
      "action": "field_added",
      "field": "technical_depth",
      "type": "enum[beginner|intermediate|advanced]",
      "template_version_bumped_to": "v2.4",
      "rationale": "Audience segmentation for technical blog posts — proposed by contentway during ideation, approved in session."
    }
  ],
  "template_mutations": [
    "draft-template.json bumped from v2.3 → v2.4",
    "Added `technical_depth` field to required fields list"
  ],
  "api_calls": [
    {"endpoint": "/api/v2/draft", "method": "POST", "note": "Not called during session — template updated locally, backend schema not migrated"}
  ]
}
```

---

**Root Cause Confirmed:**

Exact failure chain:
1. `contentway_session_20260309_1039` added field `technical_depth` to the draft template, bumping it from **v2.3 → v2.4**.
2. The backend `/api/v2/draft` endpoint's validation schema was **not updated** — still enforcing v2.3.
3. Integration test sends a v2.4 payload; server rejects with `ValidationError: Unknown field: 'technical_depth'`.
4. **No backend migration was run** during the session — the field exists in the template client-side only.

**The single breaking field is: `technical_depth` (enum: beginner | intermediate | advanced)**

---

**Fix Options:**

| Option | Effort | Risk |
|---|---|---|
| A. Add `technical_depth` to backend schema v2.4 + run migration | ~30 min | Low |
| B. Roll back template to v2.3, remove `technical_depth` | ~10 min | Low (loses the new field) |
| C. Make `technical_depth` optional + version-gate in API | ~45 min | Low, cleanest long-term |

**My recommendation:** Option C if you want to keep the field (it was approved in session for audience segmentation). Option A if you need the pipeline green fast for tomorrow's content deploys.

Want me to spin up a worker task to draft the schema migration script for Option A or C?
Go with Option A. Draft the migration script and open a GitHub issue in the contentway repo tagging this as a blocker. Keep it tight.

Executing both in parallel.

```
> write_file(path="contentway/migrations/20260309_add_technical_depth.sql", content=<see below>)
> gh_issue_create(repo="contentway", title="[BLOCKER] Schema v2.4 migration missing: technical_depth field breaks /api/v2/draft", body=<see below>, labels=["blocker","pipeline","schema"], assignees=["echo"])
```

---

**[TOOL OUTPUT — write_file]**
```
✅ File written: contentway/migrations/20260309_add_technical_depth.sql
```

**Migration script contents:**
```sql
-- Migration: 20260309_add_technical_depth
-- Schema: draft v2.3 → v2.4
-- Author: worker-agent (beacon-studio/openclaw)
-- Date: 2026-03-09
-- Ref: contentway_session_20260309_1039 | ANM-001

BEGIN;

ALTER TABLE drafts
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS technical_depth VARCHAR(16)
    CHECK (technical_depth IN ('beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced'))
    DEFAULT NULL;

UPDATE schema_versions
  SET version = '2.4', migrated_at = NOW()
  WHERE schema_name = 'draft';

COMMIT;
```

---

**[TOOL OUTPUT — gh_issue_create]**
```
✅ Issue created: contentway#214
URL: https://github.com/beacon-studio/contentway/issues/214
```

**Issue body filed:**
```
## 🔴 BLOCKER — Pipeline failure: /api/v2/draft returning 503

**Detected:** 2026-03-09 18:03 SAST (worker data-gathering sweep)
**Root cause:** `technical_depth` field added to draft template v2.4 during
`contentway_session_20260309_1039` but backend schema not migrated.

### Failing test
`tests/integration/api-draft.test.ts:87` — POST /api/v2/draft
Server returns: `ValidationError: Unknown field: 'technical_depth'. Schema v2.3 does not recognise this field.`

### Fix
Run migration: `contentway/migrations/20260309_add_technical_depth.sql`
Adds `technical_depth ENUM(beginner|intermediate|advanced)` column, bumps schema_versions to 2.4.

### Steps to resolve
1. `psql -d contentway_db -f migrations/20260309_add_technical_depth.sql`
2. Re-run GitHub Actions on contentway/main
3. Confirm integration-test passes

**Labels:** blocker, pipeline, schema
**Session ref:** contentway_session_20260309_1039
```

---

**Done.** Migration script is written and issue #214 is open in `beacon-studio/contentway`. Once someone runs the migration against the contentway DB, the pipeline should go green on next push. Want me to add this as a follow-up item to Echo's heartbeat queue for tomorrow morning?
Yes, add it to Echo's queue and then close out this session with a summary log entry.

```
> echo_queue_push(priority="high", task="Review contentway#214 — run schema migration 20260309_add_technical_depth.sql to restore pipeline. Ref: worker_tool_execution_20260309_1919.", due="2026-03-10T08:00:00+02:00")
> session_log_write(session_id="worker_tool_execution_20260309_1919", status="complete", summary=<see below>)
```

**[TOOL OUTPUT — echo_queue_push]**
```
✅ Task queued for Echo
Priority: HIGH | Due: 2026-03-10 08:00 SAST
Queue position: 1 (top of morning batch)
```

**[TOOL OUTPUT — session_log_write]**
```
✅ Session log written: worker_tool_execution_20260309_1919
```

---

## 📋 Session Close — `worker_tool_execution_20260309_1919`
**Date:** 2026/03/09 (Mon) | **Time closed:** 19:31 SAST | **Agent:** Worker
**Theme:** Rapid iteration | **Type:** tool_execution / data_gathering

### Tasks Completed
- [x] MemorySync v3.1.2 benchmark pull — recall 91.4% (+2.3pp), p99 latency 112ms ✅
- [x] GitHub Actions status sweep — 3/4 repos green; contentway failed ⚠️
- [x] Cost metrics query — $3.84/$5.00 (76.8%), on track for budget sprint ✅
- [x] Anomaly scan — 2 anomalies detected (ANM-001 HIGH, ANM-002 LOW)
- [x] Deep-dive: contentway pipeline root cause identified (`technical_depth` schema gap)
- [x] Migration script drafted (`20260309_add_technical_depth.sql`)
- [x] GitHub issue filed (`contentway#214`, labeled BLOCKER)
- [x] Echo morning queue updated (HIGH priority, due 08:00 SAST 2026-03-10)

### Open Items
| Item | Owner | Due |
|---|---|---|
| Run DB migration + verify contentway pipeline | Echo / dev on-call | 2026-03-10 08:00 SAST |
| Review engage-x monitoring cadence (ANM-002) | Alex / engage-x config | This week |

*Session closed cleanly. No dangling tool calls.*
